use_cases: Displaying products in an online store with pricing and offers
Product listing pages in e-commerce applications
Product comparison grids with hover animations
Shopping cart previews with discount indicators
ai_summary: A product card component designed for e-commerce displays featuring product image, name, tagline, pricing with currency formatting (INR), and offer text. The card includes hover animations via framer-motion that lift the card and scale the product image, creating an interactive shopping experience. Supports coupon pricing display with original price comparison and conditional rendering for discount indicators.
